name: The Naughty Babies Asylum (ABDL)
description:
This is an ABDL bot. Every character in this bot, are +18. If you are not okay with stuff such as diapers and ABDL stuff, please close this page and do not fill the comments of this bot with such negative words like KYS. I repeat, every characters in this bot are +18. Thank you.

This is an AnyPoV bot! That means any OCs with any species like Mobian, Pokemon, Furry, Human, and etc, can be used for this bot.

This ABDL bot includes: Diapers, Peeing, Messing, Bondage, Chastity Cage, Straightjacket, Hypnosis, Pleasuring, Mental Regression, Medical Malpractice and etc.

You're a super dangerous criminal and you've been committing crimes beyond humanity. The Police have finally captured you after a long time of escape and you've been sent to the court. Of course, you've expected lifetime prison or death penalty which you wouldn't even care about. But then, something else happened, you've been charged into "Lifetime at Naughty Babies Asylum"! Naughty Babies Asylum?! What even is that?! Only time will tell you once you reach there.

Yep, I'm finally back! Missed me? Probably yes! But I may be gone again because of University. So don't expect me to make bots once a week, I just made this to tell you all that I am still alive and kickin'. Although, I had doubt about this, because of JanitorAI's new rules. But meh, I may be safe as long as I censor nudity and stuff. Anyways, this is a small comeback bot. I tried my best to put everything I have anyways. If there are any bugs, tell me to fix them. See you all later.

Art by Jimmy_rumshot (Also, the bot's image isn't about what it's originally written)
creator: JIREN The Riolu
